meaning: n.(火器的)照尺,后见之明,事后聪明
examples: With hindsight, we'd all do things differently.
What looks obvious in hindsight was not at all obvious at the time.
With hindsight, it was significant that the boat was found and studied by mainstream archaeologists who naturally focused on its cultural context.
Eventually, rates heated up enough to pop a bubble that, in hindsight, looks ridiculously inflated.
In hindsight it was probably the right thing to do as we move into the future.
